title: HTAY (How Tall Are You)
description: HTAY (How Tall Are You) is a lightweight and fun Minecraft data pack that lets you customize your in-game height! 🎮✨
body:
Request your own data pack [here](https://forms.gle/rjLp2HzTL3mspPDq9) (You get credited for the idea, and a custom role on my discord)
# 
Using the /trigger height set {height in cm} command, you can adjust your character's height to match your real-life stature—or go wild and experiment! Want to be a towering giant or a tiny adventurer? HTAY makes it possible.

### Features:
- Simple and intuitive setup
- Works seamlessly in single-player or multiplayer
- Adds a unique layer of personalization to your gameplay

Whether you're role-playing, experimenting, or just having a laugh with friends, HTAY will let you stand tall—or small—on your adventures! 🏔️
